text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 48 

MDCD_PCCM_COV_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — Primary Care Case Management (PCCM) Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medicaid 
Primary Care Case Management (PCCM) Managed Care Plan. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 

COMMENT: CCW creates this variable using the DE
